title: Master Lu Fu
content:
Master 
Lu Fu
 is the ancestor and overlord of the 
Allheaven Star System
. He is the ultimate authority in the Allheaven Star System and one of the 
Sealed Realm
's  few Third-Step cultivators.

Background
[
]

He was a Celestial during the days of the 
Thunder Celestial Realm
.

He survived where others died because he is extremely cautious and doesn't take risks.

History
[
]

He first appears when 
Qing Shui
 was defending 
Wang Lin
 from the 
Yao Family Ancestor
.
[
1
]

He later fought against Tuo Sen during the war against the 
Alliance Star System
.

Links and References
[
]
